Client stories

01 / 05
Unrivaled customer service, cutting edge design and quality. Fluid Glass is firmly lodged in our list of preferred suppliers of glazing products.

Vaidas VileikisFounder, Name Architects

The customer service provided by Fluid Glass is about the best I have encountered in the industry.

Owen Davies-SmallFounder, Davies-Small Architects

Fluid Glass are great. We have finalised a few projects with them in London and abroad, and always had very professional, punctual service from them. Would recommend to all other professionals and clients.

Andreja BericFounder, Twist In Architecture

The service from Fluid Glass has been excellent. Before, during and after installation of our glazing the team demonstrated professionalism and a high standard of execution. We would have no hesitation in recommending Fluid Glass.

Devon MothersilleHomeowner

What a superb company! Our experience has been superb. They offer a superb service, selection and pricing. They also have a new showroom where clients can visit which is really well laid out and comprehensive.
